objective: Add rafka-compute binary. Joins mesh, discovers gateway+broker peers, can ping/pong.
in_scope: compute/ binary — clone gateway shape; service_name = rafka-compute
Participates in same gossip + ping/pong as established peers
out_of_scope: Any compute-specific logic (no jobs, no RSQL, no WASM)
exit_criteria: Run all 3 binaries: 3 services in Jaeger; full peer-discovery mesh between all pairs
